Chat Edit: 'PS D:\professional-nasm-ide> cd D:\professional-nasm-ide\swarm-agent
PS D:\professional-nasm-ide\swarm-agent> launch-swarm.bat
launch-swarm.bat: The term 'launch-swarm.bat' is not recognized as a name of a cmdlet, function, script file, or executable program.
Check the spelling of the name, or if a path was included, verify that the path is correct and try again.

Suggestion [3,General]: The command "launch-swarm.bat" was not found, but does exist in the current location. PowerShell does not load commands from the current location by default. If you trust this command, instead type: ".\launch-swarm.bat". See "get-help about_Command_Precedence" for more details.
PS D:\professional-nasm-ide\swarm-agent> .\launch-swarm.bat
========================================

========================================

Please install Python 3.8+ from https://python.org
Press any key to continue . . .
